Store: The name of the specific Lee’s Market store.
Year: The year in which the in-store assistance requests were made.
Quarter: The quarter of the year in which the in-store assistance requests were made.
Assistance_Type: The type of assistance requested in-store. For this scenario, it would be 'Mobile App Order Pickups'.
Request_Count: The number of in-store assistance requests made for the respective assistance type during the specified time period.
